heading: Designation; administration, protection, and development
label: 282a Designation; administration, protection, and development
text: The property acquired under the provisions of shall be known as the San Juan Island National Historical Park and shall commemorate the final settlement by arbitration of the Oregon boundary dispute and the peaceful relationship which has existed between the United States and Canada for generations. The Secretary of the Interior shall administer, protect, and develop such park in accordance with the provisions of the Act of (; et seq.), as amended and supplemented, and the Act of (; et seq.).section 282 of this title39 Stat. 53516 U.S.C. 1149 Stat. 66616 U.S.C. 4611August 25, 1916August 21, 1935See References in Text note below.1
